summary: A recorded clip, posted by the account, consisting of fixed security-camera footage of a storefront walkway labeled 'Front Entrance', with a 'VAPE CBD' sign, parked cars and traffic cones, and a date-and-time stamp reading 04-02-2026. The sampled frames show an altercation: a person in motion on the walkway, then a person lying on the ground while another person stands nearby beside a bicycle. The tweet text labels the footage with a graphic-content warning.
